title: Work with Checkboxes and Radio Buttons
description: Learn to interact with checkboxes and radio buttons in forms
instructions:
Write a Playwright test that:
1. Checks a checkbox
2. Verifies checkbox is checked
3. Unchecks the checkbox
4. Selects a radio button
5. Verifies radio button selection

    page.goto('https://practice.expandtesting.com/checkboxes')
    
    # TODO: Check the first checkbox
    
    # TODO: Verify it's checked
    
    # TODO: Uncheck the checkbox
    
    # TODO: Work with radio buttons if available
    pass

solution.python:
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

def test_checkboxes_radio(page: Page):
    page.goto('https://practice.expandtesting.com/checkboxes')
    
    checkbox1 = page.locator('#checkbox1')
    checkbox1.check()
    expect(checkbox1).to_be_checked()
    
    checkbox1.uncheck()
    expect(checkbox1).not_to_be_checked()
    
    checkbox2 = page.locator('#checkbox2')
    checkbox2.check()
    expect(checkbox2).to_be_checked()
    
    # Toggle using click
    checkbox2.click()
    expect(checkbox2).not_to_be_checked()
